texto: No! Please no," she feels the cool metalof the handcuffs again. "Please, I'mMadison, I'm Madison!"Her arms lock into place above her head.She jerks her body, pain snapping at hermuscles."You can stay like this for the day." Herises from the bed, bends down, andblows out the candles on her birthdaycake. "Night, night, Rosie.""No!"He opens the door, letting a stream ofsunlight into the room."Please don't leave me here, please!"And then the door closes, and thesunlight is gone.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Kay Botha: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “No! Please no," she feels the cool metalof the handcuffs again. "Please, I'mMadison, I'm Madison!…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que familia, dark, hush pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao-noturna e boa-noite.
